visuals.title: Cloud Service Models Responsibility Comparison
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Cloud Service Models Responsibility Comparison
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Cloud Computing and Service Models</text>

  <!-- Cloud Outline -->
  <path d="M210,60 C230,40 260,35 280,45 C300,35 330,40 350,60 C370,50 400,55 410,75 C425,65 440,80 440,100 C440,120 425,135 410,125 C400,145 370,150 350,140 C330,160 300,155 280,145 C260,155 230,160 210,140 C190,160 160,155 140,145 C120,155 90,160 70,140 C50,150 20,145 10,125 C-5,135 -20,120 -20,100 C-20,80 -5,65 10,75 C20,55 50,50 70,60 C90,40 120,35 140,45 C160,35 190,40 210,60" fill="white" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <!-- IaaS Box -->
  <rect x="120" y="100" width="80" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="160" y="125" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    IaaS
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- PaaS Box -->
  <rect x="120" y="160" width="80" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="160" y="185" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    PaaS
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- SaaS Box -->
  <rect x="120" y="220" width="80" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="160" y="245" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    SaaS
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrow from IaaS to PaaS -->
  <path d="M160,140 L160,160" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <!-- Arrow from PaaS to SaaS -->
  <path d="M160,200 L160,220" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <!-- Arrowhead marker definition -->
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="0" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- Service Model Labels -->
  <text x="250" y="125" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Infrastructure as a Service
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="250" y="185" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Platform as a Service
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="250" y="245" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Software as a Service
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Abstraction Level Indicator -->
  <text x="210" y="280" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" font-style="italic" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Increasing Abstraction Level
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
